name: live-feed
title: Live Feed
summary: Reorg-safe live social feed on 0G Storage + 0gkit-indexer. Posts are content-addressed blobs in 0G Storage; ordering and reorg-safety come from the Indexer tracking on-chain PostPublished events (requires a deployed FeedEvents contract). Falls back to storage-only mode without a contract address.

env.note: 0x-prefixed private key for signing 0G Storage transactions (required)
0G chain RPC endpoint (required for Storage and Indexer)
Deployed FeedEvents contract address. When set, enables real Indexer reorg-safety. Without it, the adapter runs in storage-only mode (posts are stored but reorg-drop is not active).
Storage namespace prefix for feed blobs (default: live-feed)
